summary: Portability audit Gap 4: telegram-reply.sh now also installed at framework-neutral .instar/scripts/ (not only .claude/scripts/); IdentityRenderer relay appendix points at the neutral path with a documented .claude/scripts/ fallback. Closes the case where a Codex/Gemini install was told to run a nonexistent relay script. migrateScripts mirror is install-if-missing + SHA-migrate, idempotent, Migration-Parity-compliant. 4-case migrator test + updated IdentityRenderer assertion + regression sweep of 4 adjacent test files. Ships v1.0.10, second of the v1.0.9-v1.0.14 hardening series.
